creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Matthew,

You shouldn't define GH_* variables if you download a static asset (links with a cube) even if it's from GitHub, GH_ variables only needs to be set if there's no available.

I also want to apologize because I didn't notice your submission prior to reviewing the other PR for snapraid (257711) that's now queued for being added to ports repo. I hope this doesn't discourage you to submit patches as I'm the one to blame.

Best regards,
Daniel
